provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, thick adventurer leather belt, wide strap of dark brown oiled leather with visible grain and slight scuffing from use, heavy brass buckle with a simple pin closure, several tool loops and a small pouch riveted to the belt, brass rivets and stitching details visible, worn utilitarian patina
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Simple belt with brass buckle, dark bg. Clean composition, good leather grain and warm brown tones. Understated but correct.
